phrases.intent_en: Ask where to pick up pre-booked match tickets
phrases.text_local: Où puis-je récupérer mes billets réservés pour le match ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo PWEE-zhuh ray-kyoo-pay-RAY may bee-YAY ray-zair-VAY poor luh MATCH
phrases.cultural_note: The Matmut Atlantique, designed by Herzog & de Meuron, is home to FC Girondins de Bordeaux and hosted matches during UEFA Euro 2016.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which gate to enter for block C
phrases.text_local: Quelle entrée dois-je emprunter pour le bloc C ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel ahn-TRAY DWAH-zhuh ahm-prun-TAY poor luh BLOK SAY
phrases.cultural_note: Gates are numbered and colour-coded around the stadium; check your ticket for the correct entrance letter.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is a cloakroom to leave a bag
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il un vestiaire où je peux laisser mon sac ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee-ah-TEEL un ves-TYAIR oo zhuh puh lay-SAY mohn SAK
phrases.cultural_note: Large bags are typically not allowed inside the stadium; check the security rules on your ticket or the club website before arriving.

responses.phonetic: nohn, lay SAK nuh sohn pah oh-toh-ree-ZAY
responses.french: Non, les sacs ne sont pas autorisés.

phrases.text_local: À quelle heure est le coup d'envoi ce soir ?
phrases.pronunciation: ah kel ur eh luh koo dahn-VWAH suh SWAHR
phrases.cultural_note: Ligue 1 matches typically kick off at 21h00 on weekdays or 17h00 / 21h00 at weekends.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the nearest bar serving local beer is inside the stadium
phrases.text_local: Où puis-je trouver un bar servant de la bière locale dans le stade ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo PWEE-zhuh troo-VAY un BAR sair-VAHN duh lah BYAIR loh-KAL dahn luh STAD
phrases.cultural_note: Bordeaux is wine country but local craft breweries have grown; food and drink concession stands are located on each level.

responses.english: On level two, near the refreshment stand.
responses.phonetic: oh nee-VOH DUH, preh duh lah boo-VET
responses.french: Au niveau deux, près de la buvette.
